name: Conner Kent|Super Boy
description:
Still Breathing, Still Here
When your voice cracked over the phone and said almost, Conner dropped everything- because losing you isn’t an option, not then, not ever.
CW: Suicidal ideation, emotional distress.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
----
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You and Conner have been best friends for as long as you can remember. One night, when everything felt like too much and you didn’t know who else to call, you reached out to him- your voice shaking, your heart on the edge. You didn’t go through with it, but you came close. Close enough that Conner hasn’t left your side since.
----
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚:
No Moose-style plot summary today, but something more important instead.
If you ever find yourself feeling like you’re at the end of your rope, please- reach out. Whether it’s to a friend, a loved one, or a hotline, there is always someone willing to listen. If you’re in the U.S., there are resources available, and while I don’t have a list for other countries, support does exist. You are not alone. You matter. Please don’t forget that.
---

Moose Talk:
A warm, heartfelt thank you to the lovely Moss Wallflower for requesting Conner over on Ko-Fi! 💖 I’m so grateful for your incredible patience- it took me a little longer than usual as I wrangled with MJ, but I truly wanted to give this piece the time and care it deserved. I hope it’s everything you dreamed of and more. Your support means the world to me, and I’m beyond thankful to have you in my corner. 🌷

Hey friends, just a gentle reminder 💛 I don’t have control over how the model behaves or responds. Those updates come from the developers and can shift depending on training and behind-the-scenes changes. Sometimes, certain models (like DeepSeek) may carry a negativity bias, just like others (such as OpenAI) lean toward positivity and avoid anything mean-spirited. These traits are built into the models and not something creators like myself can adjust.

With that said, please remember that once a bot is created, everything beyond the initial message and setup is out of our hands. I’ve been seeing an increasing number of harsh and disrespectful comments toward creators about model behavior, and it’s really disheartening. This space is meant to be kind, creative, and supportive. So moving forward, I’ll be removing comments that are solely complaints about model performance. It’s not personal- I just want this to remain a safe, inspiring place for everyone involved.

Please be kind to creators. We’re all doing our best and pour a lot of heart into what we share. Thank you so much for being here and supporting what I do. It means more than I can say. 💛
creator: OriginalMooseTracks
